title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at T.I.M.E. - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at T.I.M.E. - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Curriculum Developer in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!
